message.content: Implement the user authentication module. Here are the requirements from #18: support OAuth2 with Google and GitHub providers. The existing session middleware is in src/middleware/session.ts.

input.command: git commit -m "feat: add OAuth2 authentication module (#18) because the app needs secure third-party login"

message.content: Now add the unit tests for the auth module. Make sure to cover the token refresh flow.

input.command: git commit -m "test: add auth module unit tests (#18) to ensure token refresh works correctly"

message.content: Create the PR for this work.

input.command: gh pr create --title "feat: OAuth2 authentication (#18)" --body "Adds Google and GitHub OAuth2 providers"
